name: Wined Chicken in Deluxe Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop chicken through the bone to form chunks about 2x2 inches. Marinate all chicken chunks in wine, soya sauce, and salt for at least 20 minutes. Slice all other ingredients and have ready for cooking.
2. If your wok is small, divide the chicken into two batches and cook separately. Place 4 tablespoons of oil in a large wok, heat to smoking point, add chicken and onions, stir fry and brown on all sides with the wok uncovered (about 10 minutes). Cover wok and continue cooking chicken for another 10 minutes.
3. Uncover the wok, add celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, and stir well. Cover wok and cook vegetables for 3 minutes. Stir everything thoroughly. Mix the corn starch solution with water and add to the wok, stirring all ingredients together.
NOTE: If your wok is small, remove both batches of chicken to a serving platter. Cook vegetables and gravy in the remaining wok. Pour the cooked mixture over the chicken. This dish can be used as a main course in Canadian cuisine by not cutting the chicken so finely.
